briefdescription.para: Declare a condition variable as initialized.

detaileddescription.para: Initialize a condition variable with the default condition variable attributes.
Initialize a mutex with the default mutex attributes.
Initialize a rwlock with the default rwlock attributes.
Note that pthread attribute structs are currently noops in Zephyr.
Note that pthread attribute structs are currently noops in Zephyr.

briefdescription.para: Obtain ID of the calling thread.

detaileddescription.para: The results of calling this API from threads not created with pthread_create() are undefined.

briefdescription.para: Destroy the read-write lock attributes object.
initialize the read-write lock attributes object.

memberdef.argsstring: (pthread_t pthread, int policy, const struct sched_param *param)
memberdef.name: pthread_setschedparam

detaileddescription.para: Non-portable, extension function that conforms with most other definitions of this function.

parameterdescription.para: Negative value if kernel function error

briefdescription.para: Get name of POSIX thread and store in name buffer that is of size len.

detaileddescription.para: Non-portable, extension function that conforms with most other definitions of this function.

parameterdescription.para: POSIX thread to obtain name information
negative value if kernel function error
